title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
summary: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.

title: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
summary: Users spent a record $324 million on onchain gacha in June, even as Bitcoin hit a 21-month low. The thrill of scoring a top Pokemon card from a random pack is becoming big business

title: Chip Stocks Hit by AI Spending Worries After Rally: Markets Wrap
summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks amid concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations, with a resurgence in geopolitical risks also weighing on sentiment.

title: Aston Martin Creditors Tap Jefferies as Debt Worries Grow
summary: A group of creditors to Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc have picked Jefferies Financial Group Inc. as financial adviser as concern over the debt of the distressed British automaker grows, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Cloudflare x402 Integration Opens Door for Bitcoin in AI Agent Micropayments
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Cloudflare x402 Integration Opens Door for Bitcoin in AI Agent Micropayments
Cloudflare's adoption of the x402 protocol enables websites to monetize data for AI agents via direct crypto payments, with Bitcoin and Lightning Network positioned as strong options alongside stablecoins

title: Senate Unanimously Votes That Sam Bankman-Fried Should Never Get a Pardon
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Senate Unanimously Votes That Sam Bankman-Fried Should Never Get a Pardon
The Senate unanimously approved a nonbinding resolution declaring that former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried should "under no circumstances" receive a presidential pardon or commutation.
This post Senate Unanimous

title: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
summary: Plus, Stripe makes a $53 billion move that could crown a stablecoin king. And Ostium gets drained of $18M in the latest DeFi exploit.

title: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
summary: Zyaire Wilkins allegedly procured malware hidden in video games that infected 8,000 devices and broke into 80 crypto wallets, the FBI says.

title: Visa launching internal stablecoin platform for clients that provides access to OUSD: report
summary: Open Standard's stablecoin is expected to become a major competitor to Circle's USDC, the dominant stablecoin in the U.S.

title: US jury indicts South Dakota crypto investor on 29 counts over alleged $20 million investor fraud
summary: DOJ indicted Sioux Falls crypto investor Benjamin Paul Wiener on 29 counts over an alleged $20 million fraud, with a trial set for Sept. 15.

title: Ukraine’s outgoing defence minister attacks Zelenskyy as thousands protest against firing
summary: Mykhailo Fedorov accuses Ukrainian president and top general of blocking much-needed military reforms
